text:
Once upon a time in a peaceful village by a babbling brook, there lived eight little mice named Mousey. They loved spending their days squeaking happily amongst ancient oak trees and munching on acorns.

One sunny morning, Mousey noticed something peculiar. The sun seemed unusually bright across the sky.

Curious, Mousey gathered his buddies. They ventured deeper into the forest.

Suddenly they stumbled upon a shiny old crown. Mousey eyed it warily.

"My goodness," Mousey whispered. "What could we do?"

Suddenly, a friendly owl hooted softly.

"Ohhhh, maybe it’s magic?" said Mousey. Suddenly they heard a rustle.

A beautiful lady owl fluttered down.

"Weren’t expecting that," she chuckled. "You’ve found something special. It reminds me of feathers..."

Mousey eyed them carefully.

"We wouldn’t disturb it?" Mousey asked timidly.

"No. Leave it be."

With newfound courage, the mice held hands.

Together
